TextView.android:text: Which image type to prefer for backgrounds
Time before switching from image to video
Choose how images appear when browsing
How long the animation takes to complete
100% = fade only, lower values add scale effect
Choose what displays over system artwork
Size of system overlay in system view
Choose which image type to display over game artwork
Size of overlay image in game view
Image size relative to screen (1.0 = full width/height)
Anchor point on the image (0,0 = top-left, 1,1 = bottom-right)
Optional second overlay image displayed alongside the first
Size of second overlay image in game view
Image size relative to screen (1.0 = full width/height)
Anchor point on the image (0,0 = top-left, 1,1 = bottom-right)
Darkens background image which helps visibility of overlay image
Choose what to display while a game is running
Choose what to display during ES-DE screensaver
Double-tap screen to show/hide black overlay
Choose which apps appear in the app drawer
Controls transparency of app drawer background
Number of columns in app drawer grid
Location of game artwork (fanart, screenshots, marquees)
Integration scripts that connect ES-DE with this app
Custom system images (PNG, JPG, WebP) to override game image files. Filenames must match ES-DE system shortnames (e.g., snes.webp)
Additional logos (SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP) to supplement built-in logos. Filenames must match ES-DE system shortnames (e.g., snes.svg, snes.png)
Custom image to use as fallback and custom background (replaces built-in default). Supports PNG, JPG, WebP.
